station_address: SV Road, Junction, Aarey Rd, opposite Filmistan Studio, Goregaon West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400104
text:
Beaware all‼️

This pump will trick you and fill less fuel.
I have visited this pump multiple time and when i compare this with other pumps when i refil same amount of fuel the Gauge doesnt rises as high as compared to other pumps and even the vehicle drives for less kms.

Avoid visiting this pump its very very unethical.
The staff should be punished by the owner as i am sure in such type of practices owner might not be aware.

station_address: SV Road, Junction, Aarey Rd, opposite Filmistan Studio, Goregaon West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400104
text:
My recent experience at Bharat petrol pump in Goregaon West was quite satisfactory. The pump is located in a convenient location and is easily accessible.

The staff was courteous and helpful, providing quick service and assistance. The petrol pump had a well-maintained and clean environment, which made the refueling process smooth and hassle-free.

The fuel quality was good, and the prices were reasonable, making it a great option for those looking for affordable fuel options. The pump also had a small convenience store that offered snacks and beverages, which was quite convenient.

On the downside, the pump can get a bit crowded during peak hours, which can lead to longer waiting times. Additionally, the restroom facilities were not very clean and could use some improvement.

Overall, I would recommend Bharat petrol pump in Goregaon West for its convenient location, reasonable prices, and helpful staff. 3.5 stars.

station_address: SV Road, Junction, Aarey Rd, opposite Filmistan Studio, Goregaon West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400104
text:
Worst Service Centre. Staffs & Management isn't good & unprofessional. They remove good parts of your car & fit in other's car & later on they'll say this part is not working properly. So, you've to replace it. Be Careful. They'll never return car on time. On the delivery day, they'll say we've done these things extra & you've to pay for it.
Think 100 times before giving ur car to Patel Auto.

station_address: SV Road, Junction, Aarey Rd, opposite Filmistan Studio, Goregaon West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400104
text:
Worst petrol pump....went there for car washing.....taking 350 and not even vacuums inside car.....one person is foaming and the other guy is just washing..... within 2 mins they washed the car....when i saw it was not even cleaned properly the dust was everywhere....when i told them to clean from inside or in gap where most of dust exist they said there will be extra charges.... HORRIBLE EXPERIENCE

SKIP THIS PLACE. HIGHLY NOT RECOMMENDED 👎

station_address: SV Road, Junction, Aarey Rd, opposite Filmistan Studio, Goregaon West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400104
text:
The charges are too high with the staff always ready for a plan B to cut a pie from your pocket. They take too much time for procuring materials and whenever you ask them bout the status they say that it's not in their hands and it will take time as once u have paid and ordered for a product you can't go back on your words and the money is non refundable.

The mechanics take a toll on you if u show them their loop holes or mistakes which taking the delivery of your car.

It would be a big no from my side if you ask me for a visit at this place.

But at times choices are too narrow as companies like Chevrolet have closed their outlets and there is no other option for people owing one, but to visit this place and accept all their tantrums and paying out a heafty amount for products.

Beware of them.

station_address: SV Road, Junction, Aarey Rd, opposite Filmistan Studio, Goregaon West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400104
text:
Now I am feeling that I should have read these reviews before giving my car for repair to Patel auto. Most pathetic service and service centre. They are biggest cheaters. They fetched my petrol before giving back car to me. They returned car in condition, which is far worse than before servicing.
After servicing my right side headlamp is not working. Car is not even running 30 km/hr speed. This Patel Auto people are the cheaters of the first order. They scan my vehicle electronically and not given any report to me, even they charge Rs 1500 for it.
I promised them on face that bringing my car here is a biggest mistake and I will never bring my car to them ever again.
I request all readers to never ever visit to Patel auto for any service.
